name: San Lorenzo Osteria Bistro
content: I had dinner here after a massive argument that happened down the street from here (unrelated to the restaurant). I had been in Italy for a full week at this point, and had started to pick up some aggressive gesticulations from the locals, which I applied liberally during the argument. I think the whole ordeal started because I pointed out a graffiti drawing of a snake, and the situation escalated from there All arguments have to start from somewhere. For clarity, the debate was started by the graffiti snake, but I did not partake in any of the debating or subsequent insult throwing and calamatizing.. The food did its best to lift my mood.
